growth_records.medium: MMJS liquid medium (basal medium MMJ + thiosulfate)
growth_records.cite: Wang et al. Disproportionation of Inorganic Sulfur Compounds by Mesophilic Chemolithoautotrophic Campylobacterota. mSystems (2022). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00954-22. [PMC9948710]
growth_records.snippet: Without ferrihydrite, 10.61 mM thiosulfate was disproportionated to 10.43 mM sulfate and 4.10 mM dissolved sulfide by strain ST-27 over 12 days... the doubling times of the two strains were 2.4 and 1.9 days, respectively
growth_records.notes: Doubling time (2.4 days = 57.6 h) explicitly reported for strain ST-27 grown on thiosulfate disproportionation without ferrihydrite. growth_rate_per_h calculated as mu = ln2 / doubling_time_h = 0.6931/57.6 = 0.01203 h-1.

growth_records.cite: Wang et al. Disproportionation of Inorganic Sulfur Compounds by Mesophilic Chemolithoautotrophic Campylobacterota. mSystems (2022). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00954-22. [PMC9948710]
growth_records.snippet: When ferrihydrite was added to the medium... doubling times of strains ST-27 and ST-29 were 1.6 and 1.8 days, respectively.
growth_records.notes: Doubling time (1.6 days = 38.4 h) explicitly reported for strain ST-27, thiosulfate disproportionation with ferrihydrite added. growth_rate_per_h = ln2/38.4 = 0.01805 h-1.
